tasks.label: adb: wait usb
args: $adb='${workspaceFolder}/tools/platform-tools/adb.exe'; if (!(Test-Path $adb)) { Write-Error "adb.exe non trovato in tools/platform-tools"; exit 1 }; & $adb wait-for-device; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $adb devices

tasks.label: adb: connect tcp all-in-one
args: $adb='${workspaceFolder}/tools/platform-tools/adb.exe'; if (!(Test-Path $adb)) { Write-Error "adb.exe non trovato in tools/platform-tools"; exit 1 }; $target='${input:adbHost}:${input:adbPort}'; & $adb connect $target; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $adb -s $target wait-for-device; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $adb devices

tasks.label: adb: disconnect tcp
args: $adb='${workspaceFolder}/tools/platform-tools/adb.exe'; if (!(Test-Path $adb)) { Write-Error "adb.exe non trovato in tools/platform-tools"; exit 1 }; & $adb disconnect ${input:adbHost}:${input:adbPort}; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & $adb devices
